structured_payload_candidate.title: Fault Condition 3: Temperature Rise Across Inactive Heating Coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If RAT_avg - SAT_avg ≥ sqrt(εSAT²+εRAT²) + ΔTSF and HC = 0%, then fault: temperature rise across inactive heating coil.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault with possible diagnoses: HC sensor error, valve stuck open/leaking, gas/electric heat stuck on.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC#3  Equation  RAT AVG - SAT AVG ≥  √ƐSAT2+ ƐRAT2 + ∆TSF
and
HC = 0 %
Description  Temperature rise across inactive heating coil
Possible
Diagnosis  HCET sensor error
HCLT  sensor error
Heating coil valve stuck open or leaking
Gas or electric heat stuck on
